user_feedback: when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the UI displays a gray overlay with "PAUSED" and "Press ESC to Resume" text. The user wants these visual elements removed while keeping the pause functionality working.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: Remove the pause overlay and text from the PAUSED game phase rendering, while keeping the HUD (score and health bar) visible. The pause/unpause functionality will still work via ESC key, but without visual indication.
